title: Golden Glisten Portuguese Lamb Leg Stir-Fry
description: A romantic and savory Portuguese dish featuring lamb leg, stir-fried with aromatic spices and fresh herbs, served with crispy potatoes and caramelized onions. Perfect for a special occasion or a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality extra virgin olive oil

instructions: Season the lamb leg with salt, black pepper, chili flakes, ground cumin, and paprika. Let it sit for 30 minutes to allow the flavors to penetrate.
Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the lamb leg until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
In the same skillet, add another 2 tablespoons of olive oil. Add the sliced onions and cook until they are caramelized and golden brown, stirring occasionally.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the sliced potatoes to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until they are golden brown and crispy.
Add the chopped rosemary to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the browned lamb leg to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the meat is cooked through and the potatoes are tender.
Juice the lemons and squeeze the juice over the lamb leg. Serve immediately, garnished with additional rosemary if desired.
Serve the lamb leg with the caramelized onions and crispy potatoes. Garnish with additional rosemary if desired.
